title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Berger Paints - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Berger Paints - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Berger Paints is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Berger Paints:
Berger Paints is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Paints!
